text:
# UTCAP Source Code Audit: Hardcoded Vulnerabilities This report highlights over 100 instances of hardcoded values, paths, network IPs, and dummy data found in the codebase. These pose significant maintainability, portability, and scaling risks. ## Network & IPs _188 issues found in this category. Showing key examples:_ - **default_config.json** (Line 9): "db_host": "10.100.104.150", - **default_config.json** (Line 16): "update_manifest_url": "http://192.168.0.250/ut_vfx_updates/manifest.json", - **bin\OpenRV\lib\ipaddress.py** (Line 402): >>> ipaddress.ip_address("127.0.0.1").reverse_pointer - **bin\OpenRV\lib\smtplib.py** (Line 270): addr = '127.0.0.1' - **bin\OpenRV\lib\socket.py** (Line 95): _LOCALHOST = '127.0.0.1' - **bin\OpenRV\lib\idlelib\pyshell.py** (Line 66): HOST = '127.0.0.1' # python execution server on localhost loopback - **bin\OpenRV\lib\idlelib\rpc.py** (Line 71): LOCALHOST = '127.0.0.1' - **bin\OpenRV\lib\idlelib\run.py** (Line 41): LOCALHOST = '127.0.0.1' - **bin\OpenRV\lib\site-packages\pip\_vendor\rich\logging.py** (Line 248): log.info("Listening on http://127.0.0.1:8080") - **bin\OpenRV\lib\test\audit-tests.py** (Line 346): sock.bind(('127.0.0.1', 8080)) - **bin\OpenRV\lib\test\test_epoll.py** (Line 55): client.connect(('127.0.0.1', self.serverSocket.getsockname()[1])) - **bin\OpenRV\lib\test\test_httpservers.py** (Line 1001): self.handler.client_address = ('127.0.0.1', 1337) - **bin\OpenRV\lib\test\test_mailbox.py** (Line 2217): Received: from localhost (localhost [127.0.0.1]) - **bin\OpenRV\lib\test\test_mailbox.py** (Line 2221): Received: from localhost [127.0.0.1] ## Local User Paths (C:\Users) _2 issues found in this category. Showing key examples:_ - **bin\OpenRV\lib\test\test_os.py** (Line 2724): @unittest.skipUnless(os.path.lexists(r'C:\Users\All Users') - **bin\OpenRV\lib\test\test_os.py** (Line 2736): target = os.readlink(r'C:\Users\All Users') ## Server Paths (Z:\, D:\Soft) _14 issues found in this category. **bin\OpenRV\lib\threading.py** (Line 1434): module, a dummy thread object with limited functionality is returned. - **bin\OpenRV\lib\threading.py** (Line 1440): return _DummyThread() ## UI Layout & Dimensions (Hardcoded Pixels) _Fixed pixel values prevent UI scaling on high DPI monitors and 4K screens. Showing key examples:_ - **gatekeeper_main.py** (Line 82): title.setStyleSheet("color: #FF5555; font-weight: bold; font-size: 16px;") - **gatekeeper_main.py** (Line 88): msg_label.setStyleSheet("color: white;
